title: Wynncraft Cakedition
description: Yet another Wynncraft client modpack. That might solve you map being black. Current outdated now. 112.2 and 1.19.4 are achieved and won't received further update.
body:
![](https://github.com/HarrytheCake/WynncraftCakediton/blob/main/resource/titlewynncraft.png?raw=true) *Yet Another wynncraft client modpack 欸對，又是一個wynncraft的模組包。* **Forge Version still WIP**
**NOTIFICATION: THIS MODPACK IS CURRENTLY OUTDATED** ## What does it have - Performance > Wynncraft Cakedition provides you decent performance boost , thanks to great mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)(1.19.4) , [Betterfps](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/betterfps)(1.12.2) and many more! - QoL > Mainly [Wynntils(Mirrored)](https://github.com/HarrytheCake/Artemis) and a few more but don't affect performance like [Invhud](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-hud-forge) and others! - Minimum unnecessary graphic > This pack don't came up with too much graphic enhancement so it can reduce the impact to performance by some. But still , shader support mod is install in 1.19.4 [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) and come with a great shader pack [complementary-reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)!
For 1.12.2 you'll need to manually install [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/downloads) by yourself due to the license issue.
How to install it. 1. Click Optifine.
2. Find for Minecraft 1.12.2 version and download it.
3. Run the installer and click "Extract" and put it where you can find it easy.
4. Drag Optifine mod into your .minecraft/mods folder .
5. Enjoy!
- Minor Chinese Support 些微的中文支持 (1.12.2 only) > The 1.12.2 version start with Chinese having WCT-R providing minor translations on item stats and others on default.
預設下，WCT-R(詞條翻譯)是開啟的狀態。
How to turn on translation from wynntils 如何打開wynntils翻譯功能! 1. Esc and click Wynntils menu. Esc 並單擊 Wynntils 菜單。
2. Click configuration. 單擊 configuration。
3. Click search bar for and type "translation" , and scroll down to click the translation button on left side then click to enable translation and select target language to "zh" . and click apply .
點擊搜索欄並輸入 "翻譯"，然後向下滾動，點擊左側的translation條例。 然後點擊啟用traslation並將language選擇為 "zh"，然後點左下的apply。
Useful Links -- Contact me on [Wynntils Discord](https://discord.gg/SZuNem8) server or [Unofficial Wynncraft qq group](http://qm.qq.com/cgi-bin/qm/qr?_wv=1027&k=yOW6WgbWonnlILBfh3jXhbKmd04sImlE&authKey=erIjzFoyFndhYr77b2maCchytKkZxUZQ4EBF0IccnoTfAzBNsFQ1PFMAZBDtaL8z&noverify=0&group_code=211320297) for issues and suggestions.
[Github](https://github.com/HarrytheCake/WynncraftCakediton)Page(WIP) Mod List ----- You can find the mods list from [version](https://modrinth.com/modpack/wynncake/versions) (scroll down a bit) , underneath is for mods aren't in modrinth.
Modlist for 1.12.2! - [Better HUD](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-hud) - [Blur](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blur) - [CleanView](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cleanview) - [Custom Loading Screen](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-loading-screen) - [Custom Main Menu (Customized Version that added images and change default options inside .jar)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/custom-main-menu) - [noautojump](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/no-auto-jump/files) - [Wynncraft Inventory Manager](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wynncraft-inventory-management) - Wynncraft Chinese Translate (Chinese version only)
Credits -- Thanks [gensokyo-reimagined-qol](https://modrinth.com/modpack/gensokyo-reimagined-qol) for configurations of many mods.
Thanks [WukiBaka](https://github.com/LittleStoryPlus) for mirrored wynntils.
Thanks Moe_Block for language support.
Thanks Moe_Muyo for texture support.
Thanks NotAFish for wynncraft assets permission consult. ### Disclamer This modpack is not affiliated with Wynntils or any other mod included or Wynncraft. *Do not* report any modpack related bugs or issues to them. Report them directly to me instead.
